title: nasturtium incisum
intro: Nasturtium incisum, also known as Indian cress or tall watercress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its edible leaves, stems, and flowers. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of nasturtium incisum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support the immune system. Nasturtium incisum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be consumed raw in salads or as a garnish for its peppery flavor.
